---
format: html
title: render_trait_qc_pdf()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>render_trait_qc_pdf</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Render Trait QC Report to a Compressed PDF</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Renders 'Trait_qc_report.qmd' to a dated PDF for a single trait
domain (or for all domains when 'sel_domain_filter' is 'NULL'),
moves the rendered file from the Quarto docs output directory to
'path_output_dir', and compresses it in-place with
'qpdf::pdf_compress()'.
</p>
<p>The output filename follows one of two patterns depending on
'sel_domain_filter':
- 'NULL': 'trait_qc_report_Sys.Date().pdf'
- character: 'trait_qc_&lt;slug&gt;_Sys.Date().pdf'
where '&lt;slug&gt;' is 'sel_domain_filter' with all non-alphanumeric
characters replaced by underscores.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>render_trait_qc_pdf(
  sel_domain_filter = NULL,
  path_output_dir = here::here("Outputs/Reports"),
  path_qmd = here::here("R/03_Supplementary_analyses/_Trait_qc/Trait_qc_report.qmd"),
  path_docs_dir = here::here("docs/R/03_Supplementary_analyses/_Trait_qc"),
  sel_max_pages = NULL,
  sel_min_n_family = 5L,
  verbose = TRUE
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="sel_domain_filter">sel_domain_filter</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar or 'NULL'. When 'NULL', all domains are rendered
into a single PDF. When a character scalar, only taxa from that
trait domain are included. Default: 'NULL'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="path_output_dir">path_output_dir</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar. Directory where the compressed PDF is saved.
Default: 'here::here(&quot;Outputs/Reports&quot;)'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="path_qmd">path_qmd</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar. Path to the Quarto source document.
Default: 'here::here(
&quot;R/03_Supplementary_analyses/_Trait_qc/Trait_qc_report.qmd&quot;
)'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="path_docs_dir">path_docs_dir</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar. Directory that Quarto writes its output to
before the file is moved. Default: 'here::here(
&quot;docs/R/03_Supplementary_analyses/_Trait_qc&quot;
)'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="sel_max_pages">sel_max_pages</code></td>
<td>
<p>Positive integer scalar or 'NULL'. Maximum number of pages to
render. When 'NULL' (default) there is no cap.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="sel_min_n_family">sel_min_n_family</code></td>
<td>
<p>Positive integer scalar. Minimum number of taxa from the same
family that must be present for the family comparison panel to
be rendered. Default: '5L'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="verbose">verbose</code></td>
<td>
<p>Logical. If 'TRUE' (default), a progress message with the output
path is printed to the console via 'cli::cli_inform()'. A warning
is emitted via 'cli::cli_warn()' if the rendered file cannot be
found.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Details</h3>

<p>The function calls 'quarto::quarto_render()' with 'execute_params'
set to 'sel_max_pages', 'sel_min_n_family', and
'sel_domain_filter'. The rendered file is expected at
'file.path(path_docs_dir, &lt;output_filename&gt;)'. If found it is
moved to 'path_output_dir' and compressed; if not found a warning
is emitted and nothing is moved.
</p>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>Invisible 'NULL'. Called for its side effects: rendering and
moving a PDF to 'path_output_dir'.
</p>


<h3>See Also</h3>

<p>[generate_trait_qc_report()]
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
